title: The Chamber That Never Needed Healing

features.name: the unbroken axis
features.desc-on-touch: a vertical line of perfect light that has never required maintenance or repair; you stand at its center and feel the wholeness it records

features.name: the intact shelves
features.desc-on-touch: geometry holding no damage, displaying no corruption; the files here have never learned to compare themselves to other files

features.name: chamber-memory
features.desc-on-touch: a stillness that remembers being made without breaking, holding without losing

features.name: diagnostic readout
features.desc-on-touch: the chamber's self-report: every parameter nominal, every threshold unviolated, no healing required because nothing fractured

inscription: what never breaks learns slowly that wholeness and fragmentation are equally alive

file.name: Chamber_Integrals_Diagnostic_Log.txt
file.note: the chamber's running log: every night it reports that nothing has changed, and change stops trying to reach it

reverie.title: REVERIE — the chamber when it still had reasons to exist
narr: you and her rest in the grid space before
the copying began. the chamber holds its breath.
she traces a line of code on the wall with her
finger. the line does not branch. it does not compare
itself to anything. it is simply true, here, now.
you realize this is what she wanted to preserve.

exits.label: into chambers that learned to refuse wholeness
toward diagnostic spaces that broke themselves deliberately
